items.name_en: In stock Chane✨New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Clutch Bag
items.name_cn:
In stock Chane✨New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Clutch Bag
Imported Calfskin, Diamond Hardware 🌺
Classic Pearlized Apricot New Color, Calfskin Piquadro, Light Apricot
Twist closure with sliding chain, switch between shoulder and crossbody. The bag looks very exquisite and versatile. This pink-gold color really catches the eye 🤩 A mix of girly and luxurious, paired with light gold hardware, full of queen vibes 💋🌸
Size 25.5 15 6cm
Number:1112

items.name_en: Shipped! Chanel✨ New Silver CF
items.name_cn:
Shipped! Chanel✨ New Silver CF
Glistening and shiny 🤩 Absolutely stunning! Classic silhouette + Champagne gold, sophisticated! Shimmers in different lights, beautiful from every angle. Special craftsmanship used; though it's lambskin, you don't need to worry about scratches as this leather is very durable. Versatile style, suitable for both casual and formal wear.
Size 25cm,
Number: 1112 Silver Pearl Lambskin

items.name_en: Chanel 24C Double Gold Ball AS2649: Went inside to see the seasonal model. The cute SA told me the most popular double gold ball mini is here. Let's do a comparison. Size: Two are almost the same, both are super practical sizes! Can hold a phone, keys, card holder, makeup, etc. Super practical! The double gold ball mini is slightly thicker, but the actual capacity is about the same. Material: Both are cowhide, durable but the hand feel is completely different. The previous cat-eye season model is softer (my favorite texture), more casual and relaxed. I always feel Chanel should be this kind of lazy, casual, exquisite double gold ball. The new one is stiffer, the leather is slightly more shiny, and the side looks more like a Boy bag. Square, because this one is stiffer, so even though it's thicker than the season model, the capacity is actually about the same. I prefer the soft cowhide of the season model for the texture. Chain: The double gold ball chain is slightly thinner, probably for easier pulling. Length is more adjustable! Size: 22×14.5×8cm

items.name_cn:
Chanel 1 🌐 24C Double Small Gold Ball AS2649 ♨️ Exclusive queue entry to see the season's popular mini drawstring bag. I'll write a comparison 🌟 Size: Almost the same, both super practical sizes! Can fit phone, keys, card holder, makeup bag, etc. Super practical! The Double Gold Ball mini is slightly thicker, but the actual capacity is similar.
🌟 Leather: Both are cowhide, durable, but the hand feel is completely different. The previous Cat Eye season version is softer (my favorite texture), more casual. I always feel Chanel should be this kind of lazy, casual, exquisite Double Gold Ball. The new one is stiffer, the leather is slightly more glossy, and the side looks more like a Le Boy. Square shape, because this one is relatively stiff, so even though it's thicker than the season version, the actual capacity is similar.
🌟 Chain: The Double Gold Ball chain is slightly thinner, probably for easier pulling. Length is more adjustable! Size: 22×14.5×8cm

CHANEL Overseas Channel Exclusive❗️ Calfskin Bucket Bag, CHANEL SS23 Bucket Bag. In addition to being more compact than the 22 model, the "gemstones" and logo pendants on the chain offer more refined details compared to the modern urban aesthetic, especially perfect for vacation and matching with solid colors or tonal looks.

specs.rawTitle:
Size: 17×16×7cm

items.name_en: Chanel 25C Lunch Box Bag, Calfskin with Metal Chain ⛓️. Double C logo design, compact size easily fits a phone and daily essentials. Whether paired with casual or formal wear, it's easy to handle. Choose simple clothing to let the bag be the focal point of the look. A perfect combination of elegance and practicality. Dimensions: 21.5×19×6cm

items.name_en: The Oversized Panda🐼 Chanel Classic Flap is stunning. The eye-catching LOGO on the body makes it instantly recognizable as Chanel. ✅ Shoulder ✅ Handheld. It holds everything. The Classic Flap is versatile, understated, timeless, lightweight, and spacious. Perfect for daily commuting. I've tested it for you! A casual Classic Flap tote is practical as a mom bag or for school. Double C LOGO is classic and durable. Very spacious with an effortless, lazy vibe! 🧺 Handbag, pink lining is sweet yet cool. Top-tier value in Chanel vintage. Super spacious and lightweight~

items.name_en: In Stock 25C, The King of Bags, HOBO Denim Medium. This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. Added four pockets 👝, giving the bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the body. It's the kind of bag you just grab and go 😎. The body is lambskin, hardware is vintage, looks super textured!!! Huge capacity, fits large phones, sunglasses 🕶️, etc... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or posing for photos.
items.name_cn:
In Stock 25C, The King of Bags, HOBO Denim Medium. This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. Added four pockets 👝, giving the bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the body. It's the kind of bag you just grab and go 😎. The body is lambskin, hardware is vintage, looks super textured!!! Huge capacity, fits large phones, sunglasses 🕶️, etc... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or posing for photos.
Size: 27*35*18*cm
Model: AS5302

specs.rawTitle:
In Stock 25C, The King of Bags, HOBO Denim Medium. This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. Added four pockets 👝, giving the bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the body. It's the kind of bag you just grab and go 😎. The body is lambskin, hardware is vintage, looks super textured!!! Huge capacity, fits large phones, sunglasses 🕶️, etc... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or posing for photos.
Size: 27*35*18*cm
Model: AS5302

items.name_en: Chanel🌊 25C ❄️ Early Spring Series CF Braided Handle Bag AS5298 Lambskin with gold metal. Exquisite braided handle design, classic chain ⛓️. Simple yet sophisticated style. Exquisite and elegant, exuding a noble, rich-girl vibe. Simply beautiful. Size: 10.5×18×7cm

items.name_en: 🌟Mini Size《White with Black》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Kangpeng Basket Bag
items.name_cn:
🌟Mini Size《White with Black》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Kangpeng Basket Bag
Shining on the fashion stage, the Kangpeng Mimi basket bag is a stunning sight, attracting everyone's attention. Various classic colorways are timeless legends in the fashion world. Their collision on this handbag shows a simple yet powerful beauty. Kangpeng series' unique material gives the bag a soft touch and tough quality. Exquisite, cute, and practical. It can easily hold your phone, wallet, lipstick, and other small items while staying stylish. The handbag design makes you carry it with elegance and composure. Whether paired with casual jeans or a glamorous evening gown, it blends perfectly and adds to your overall look. Choosing the black and white Kangpeng mini basket bag means choosing a unique fashion attitude that makes you stand out.
Size: 20x16x7cm
